evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: No explicit rigour or velocity signal phrases appear; responsibilities are described neutrally as building and integrating reports without quality or speed emphasis.
evidence.domain_risk: developing and maintaining data models, queries, and views in SAP environments
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Manufacturing/operational SAP reporting affects business decisions without explicit financial-reporting or regulatory language.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools already in production (SAP BW, SAC, Databricks, Power BI) point to a growing, mid-maturity function rather than greenfield.
evidence.jd_authorship: develop analytics solutions using Azure Databricks, including Power BI reports and dashboards
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific SAP modules (BW, BW/4HANA, SAC, Datasphere) and named tools give precise, hiring-manager-level detail.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: unifying SAP and non-SAP system data
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role centres on the internal data/reporting platform itself rather than a specific business function.
evidence.autonomy_level: creating and optimizing reports, stories, and planning content
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Execution verbs (developing, maintaining, integrating, processing) dominate with no strategic direction-setting language.
evidence.ai_role: familiarity with artificial intelligence and machine learning concepts
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Only a vague 'familiarity with AI/ML concepts' phrase appears, not a concrete expectation of AI tool usage or AI-infrastructure building.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No testing, data contracts, or data quality framework language appears anywhere in the JD.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: None: the JD is framed entirely in delivery/capability terms with no risk or compliance register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: integrate new data sources via Business Data Cloud and develop analytics solutions using Azure Databricks
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of advancing existing BW implementations and integrating new Business Data Cloud sources.
